ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the farm from which data is collected */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the specific field within the farm */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop type */,
  "growth_stage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the growth stage */,
  "yield_measurement" REAL /* Yield measurement in tons */,
  "environmental_data" TEXT /* Environmental data (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "data_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection method */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "field_area" REAL /* Area of the field in hectares */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the field */,
  "irrigation_method" TEXT /* Method of irrigation used */,
  "fertilizer_type" TEXT /* Type of fertilizer used */,
  "pesticide_type" TEXT /* Type of pesticide used */,
  "historical_data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to historical data for trend analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_growth_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("growth_stage_id") REFERENCES growth_stages ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "farms" (
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farm */,
  "farm_name" TEXT /* Name of the farm */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the farm */,
  "owner_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the farm owner */,
  "farm_size" REAL /* Total area of the farm in hectares */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date the farm was established */,
  "number_of_fields" INTEGER /* Number of fields in the farm */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the farm owner */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the farm owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the farm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop type */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crop */,
  "growth_period" INTEGER /* Average growth period of the crop in days */,
  "optimal_soil_type" TEXT /* Optimal soil type for the crop */,
  "optimal_climate" TEXT /* Optimal climate conditions for the crop */,
  "common_pests" TEXT /* Common pests that affect the crop */,
  "common_diseases" TEXT /* Common diseases that affect the crop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the growth stage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the growth stage */,
  "duration_days" INTEGER /* Average duration of the growth stage in days */,
  "optimal_conditions" TEXT /* Optimal environmental conditions for the growth stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of how data is collected */,
  "accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the data collection method */,
  "cost_per_use" REAL /* Cost per use of the data collection method */,
  "maintenance_requirements" TEXT /* Maintenance requirements for the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, farmer, admin) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
